meta.title: The Mended Mirror — Master Taxonomy / Completeness Registry
meta.mandate: Joe: full coverage — every available human belief system, New Age included, dark/occult included, no exceptions or exclusions. Every ingredient for the dish.
meta.method: 7-specialist parallel completeness sweep (Abrahamic / Dharmic-E.Asian / African+diaspora / indigenous-Americas-Oceania-Siberia / ancient-dead / Western-esoteric-occult-dark / New-Age-NRM-secular) → deduped + granularity-judged here.
meta.altitude_rule: A SHARD sits at the civilization / distinct-current altitude of the existing 54 (Greek, Norse, Yoruba, Abrahamic...). True sub-variants (denominations, nações, regional NRMs) FOLD as figures or gloss-notes inside an anchor shard — represented, never excluded. Joe can promote any FOLD to a full shard by saying so.

status_legend.fold: represent as figures/notes inside another shard (target in `into`)

wave_legend.1: Joe's named categories (New Age, dark/occult) + his standing Abrahamic split + glaring civilization-gaps
wave_legend.2: strong distinct traditions — major indigenous, ancient/dead, world-religion branches

meta.counts_note: Tally is computed at render time.

items.name: Proto-Indo-European
items.anchor: Dyēus the sky-father (the root of Zeus/Jupiter/Dyaus/Tyr)

items.name: Mesopotamian (Sumer/Akkad/Babylon)
items.anchor: Anu, Marduk, Inanna, Ereshkigal

items.name: Egyptian
items.anchor: Ra, Osiris, Isis, Thoth, Maʿat

items.name: Canaanite / Levantine (Phoenician)
items.anchor: Baal, El, Asherah, Leviathan

items.name: Hittite / Anatolian
items.anchor: Tarhunna, Illuyanka, Kumarbi

items.name: Pre-Islamic Arabian
items.anchor: Hubal, al-Lat, al-Uzza, Manat, the Kaaba black stone

items.name: Elamite
items.anchor: Inshushinak + the highland triad Napirisha/Kiririsha
items.note: non-Semitic, non-IE isolate pantheon

items.name: Hurrian
items.anchor: Teshub vs Kumarbi succession-myth — the SOURCE of the Greek Kronos-Zeus pattern
items.note: feeds hittite & greek; documented transmission = rare tier-2 seam

items.name: Urartian (Van / Ararat)
items.anchor: Haldi the war-god atop a lion
items.note: sibling to hurrian

items.name: Nubian / Kushite (Meroitic)
items.anchor: Apedemak the lion-headed war-god (indigenous, vs imported Amun)
items.note: NOT a fold of egyptian — the indigenous Meroitic layer

items.name: Carthaginian / Punic
items.anchor: Tanit & Baal Hammon; the tophet rite
items.note: Phoenician diaspora; distinct western development of canaanite

items.name: Berber / Amazigh (Libyco-Berber)
items.anchor: Gurzil the bull-god; Tanit/Ifri; the Siwa oracle of Ammon
items.note: pre-Islamic North Africa; survivals in Rif/Kabyle folk practice

items.name: Indus Valley / Harappan
items.anchor: the 'Pashupati' proto-Shiva seal; terracotta Mother-Goddess; pipal & water cult
items.note: pre-Vedic substrate; speculative tiers — flag honestly

items.name: Greek
items.anchor: Zeus, Athena, Hermes, Prometheus, Dionysus

items.name: Roman
items.anchor: Jupiter (thin shard — deepen)

items.name: Norse / Germanic
items.anchor: Tyr, Thor, Loki, Yggdrasil

items.name: Celtic
items.anchor: Taranis, Danu, Badb

items.name: Slavic
items.anchor: Perun (thin shard — deepen: Veles, Mokosh, Svarog)

items.name: Baltic (Lithuanian / Latvian)
items.anchor: Dievas, Perkūnas, Saulė — rebuilt the Dyēus cognate-star at tier-1

items.name: Finnish / Karelian (Kalevala)
items.anchor: Ukko, Ilmatar, the Sampo, Väinämöinen

items.name: Etruscan
items.anchor: Tinia, Uni, Menrva, the Piacenza liver / disciplina etrusca

items.name: Basque
items.anchor: Mari, Sugaar, the herensuge dragon

items.name: Minoan
items.anchor: the Snake-Goddess / Mountain-Mother; labrys & bull-leaping
items.note: pre-Greek Aegean — NOT a fold of greek

items.name: Mycenaean (Linear B)
items.anchor: Potnia 'the Lady'; earliest attested Zeus/Poseidon
items.note: ancestral to greek but doctrinally distinct (Potnia, di-wo-nu-so)

items.name: Scythian
items.anchor: Tabiti the fire/hearth goddess; Ares as a planted iron sword
items.note: E. Iranian steppe — distinct from vedic/zoroastrian

items.name: Thracian
items.anchor: Zalmoxis the immortality-god; the Thracian Horseman
items.note: fold dacian (Gebeleizis) as a figure here

items.name: Illyrian
items.anchor: Dei-pátrous / Redon; serpent-veneration → Albanian folklore

items.name: Iberian (pre-Roman, non-IE)
items.anchor: the Lady-goddess (Dama de Elche); sphinx/underworld cult

items.name: Lusitanian / Gallaecian
items.anchor: Endovelicus the oracular healer; Ataecina
items.note: para-Celtic IE; distinct from non-IE iberian

items.name: Guanche (Canary Islands)
items.anchor: Achamán the sky-father; Guayota the volcano-demon of Teide
items.note: insular Berber, extinct post-conquest

items.name: Eleusinian Mysteries
items.anchor: Demeter & Persephone; the secret kykeon initiation
items.note: distinct mystery institution, not civic greek; seams to persephone/demeter

items.name: Orphism
items.anchor: Orpheus & dismembered Zagreus; the gold soul-tablets
items.note: fold pythagorean? keep twinned

items.name: Pythagoreanism
items.anchor: number as cosmos; metempsychosis; the akousmata brotherhood

items.name: Dionysian / Bacchic Mysteries
items.anchor: ecstatic mania, maenads, the liknon
items.note: Dionysus is in greek; the initiatory mysteria are distinct

items.name: Mithraism (Roman Mysteries of Mithras)
items.anchor: the tauroctony (bull-slaying); 7-grade cave initiation
items.note: ★ Late-Antiquity 'big-3 receipts' seam — Roman cult distinct from Iranian Mithra

items.name: Cult of Isis & Serapis
items.anchor: Isis Myrionymos 'of ten-thousand names'; Serapis
items.note: ★ Isis-Madonna borrowing seam; Hellenistic mystery, distinct from pharaonic egyptian

items.name: Cybele / Magna Mater (Phrygian)
items.anchor: the Great Mother & Attis; the Galli; the taurobolium blood-baptism

items.name: Sol Invictus
items.anchor: the Unconquered Sun; Aurelian's 274 CE state cult; Dec-25 Dies Natalis
items.note: ★ Sol-Invictus→Christmas borrowing seam — the headline 'big-3 receipt'

items.name: Neoplatonism
items.anchor: Plotinus' emanation from the One; theurgy (Iamblichus)
items.note: bridges to gnostic / hermeticism / kabbalah

items.name: Stoicism
items.anchor: the Logos/pneuma pervading a providential cosmos; kata physin
items.note: its pantheist cosmology functions as a belief-system

items.name: Epicureanism
items.anchor: gods in the metakosmia, indifferent; atomism; ataraxia
items.note: a deus-otiosus theology

items.name: Sabians of Harran (astral cult)
items.anchor: seven planetary temple-spirits; Hermes as prophet — last living pagan astral cult
items.note: Hermetic overlap; survived into Islamic era

items.name: Zoroastrian / Persian
items.anchor: Ahura Mazda vs Angra Mainyu; Aṣ̌a; the Amesha Spentas; Frashokereti

items.name: Gnostic / Hermetic
items.anchor: the Monad, Sophia, Yaldabaoth, the divine spark
items.note: ★ SPLIT: Hermeticism & Manichaeism should leave this composite (see hermeticism, manichaeism)

items.name: Manichaeism
items.anchor: Mani; radical Light/Darkness dualism — a universal world religion
items.note: ★ split OUT of gnostic — it was a world religion, not a footnote

items.name: Abrahamic (composite — to be DISSOLVED)
items.anchor: yahweh, christ, eden-four-rivers, ein-sof
items.note: ★ Joe's standing ask: split into judaism/christianity/islam; reassign its 4 figures

items.name: Judaism (Rabbinic)
items.anchor: YHWH, Torah, the covenant; the Oral Law
items.note: the trunk; fold Karaite, Hasidism, Sabbatean/Frankist as figures; Second-Temple Judaism as a historical figure-cluster

items.name: Christianity
items.anchor: Christ, Trinity, the Cross & Resurrection
items.note: one shard with branch-figures (Catholic/Orthodox/Protestant/Coptic); LDS & JW may warrant own shards (wave 2); Cathar/Bogomil/Arian = historical figures

items.name: Islam
items.anchor: Allah, the Qur'an, the Prophet; Sunni/Shia/Sufi streams
items.note: one shard with branch-figures; Sufism rich enough to flag for its own shard

items.name: Kabbalah (Jewish esoteric)
items.anchor: Ein Sof & the ten Sefirot; the Zohar
items.note: own esoteric shard — bridges to hermetic-qabalah & western esotericism

items.name: Samaritanism
items.anchor: Mt Gerizim (not Jerusalem); the Samaritan Pentateuch
items.note: ancient living parallel to Judaism

items.name: Bahá'í Faith
items.anchor: Baháʼu'lláh; progressive revelation; unity of all religions
items.note: fold Bábism as the precursor figure

items.name: Druze (Muwaḥḥidūn)
items.anchor: al-Hakim as divine manifestation; taqammus (reincarnation); closed initiation

items.name: Yazidism (Êzidî)
items.anchor: Melek Taûs the Peacock Angel; the seven holy beings
items.note: gnostic-adjacent; commonly & wrongly demonized — handle with care

items.name: Yarsanism / Ahl-e Haqq
items.anchor: Sultan Sahak; the Divine in seven avatars; the jam
items.note: Kurdish esoteric; kin to yazidism

items.name: Alevism (Qizilbash / Bektashi)
items.anchor: the cem ritual, semah dance; the Twelve Imams; no mosque
items.note: fold Bektashi order; heterodox Shia-Sufi

items.name: Alawism (Nusayrism)
items.anchor: the Ali-Muhammad-Salman trinity; metempsychosis; secret rites

items.name: Mandaeism (Sabians)
items.anchor: John the Baptist as great prophet; World of Light vs Darkness; masbuta baptism
items.note: ★ the last living Gnostic religion — a real tier-2 seam to gnostic

items.name: Rastafari
items.anchor: Haile Selassie I as Jah; Babylon vs Zion; Ethiopianism; the ganja sacrament
items.note: cross-listed with diaspora; Abrahamic/Old-Testament-rooted

items.name: Nation of Islam
items.anchor: W.D. Fard as God-in-person; Elijah Muhammad; Yakub myth; the Mother Plane
items.note: fold Five-Percent Nation & Moorish Science Temple as kin-figures (or wave-3 shards)

items.name: Black Hebrew Israelites
items.anchor: African Americans as the literal lost tribes of Israel

items.name: Vedic / Hindu
items.anchor: Dyaus-Pita, Indra, Varuna, Agni, Shiva, Brahman, Purusha-Prakriti

items.name: Buddhist cosmology
items.anchor: Sumeru, Mara, the Wheel, Anatman, Avalokiteshvara, the kalpas

items.name: Jain cosmology
items.anchor: the loka-body, the Tirthankaras, ahimsa, anekantavada, the kalacakra

items.name: Dravidian / Tamil
items.anchor: Murugan, Kotravai, Mariyamman, anangu

items.name: Bön (Tibetan Yungdrung)
items.anchor: the pre-Buddhist Tibetan substrate

items.name: Sikhism
items.anchor: Ik Onkar — one formless creator; the Guru Granth Sahib as living Guru
items.note: major world religion; clearly missing at civilization-altitude

items.name: Shaivism
items.anchor: Shiva as supreme reality; lingam, Nataraja, the third eye
items.note: split from vedic? — flag for Joe; largest Hindu stream

items.name: Vaishnavism
items.anchor: Vishnu/Krishna; the avatara doctrine; bhakti
items.note: split from vedic? — flag; fold ISKCON/Gaudiya as a modern figure

items.name: Shaktism
items.anchor: Devi/Shakti supreme; Durga, Kali, the ten Mahavidyas
items.note: split from vedic? — flag; fold Hindu Tantra/Sri Vidya here

items.name: Lingayatism (Veerashaivism)
items.anchor: Basava; the ishtalinga; rejection of caste & rebirth
items.note: self-identifies as a distinct religion

items.name: Ayyavazhi
items.anchor: Ayya Vaikundar; the Akilam scripture; anti-caste

items.name: Brahmoism / Arya Samaj (Hindu reform)
items.anchor: Ram Mohan Roy / Dayananda; formless monotheism; 'back to the Vedas'
items.note: fold both reform movements together

items.name: Kalash religion
items.anchor: Dezau the creator; Balumain — the LAST living Indo-Aryan pagan tradition
items.note: ★ high value — a surviving branch of the IE root

items.name: Balinese Hinduism (Agama Hindu Dharma)
items.anchor: Acintya/Sang Hyang Widhi; Tri Hita Karana; offering-ritualism
items.note: syncretic Hindu-Buddhist-animist; distinct from mainland

items.name: Sarnaism / Adivasi nature-religion
items.anchor: the sacred grove (sarna sthal); village & ancestral spirits
items.note: anchor shard for India's tribal religions — fold Santal/Sari, Gond/Koya Punem, Bhil, Donyi-Polo, Sanamahism, Bathou, Kirat-Mundhum as figures (or promote any to wave-3 shards)

items.name: Buddhist vehicles (Theravada / Mahayana / Vajrayana)
items.anchor: the arahant / the bodhisattva / the tantric deity-yoga
items.note: the existing buddhist shard is cosmological; Joe may want Theravada/Mahayana/Vajrayana (+Zen/Pure-Land/Nichiren) as their own shards — flag. For now: figures within buddhist.

items.name: Modern Hindu-derived NRMs
items.anchor: TM, Brahma Kumaris, Self-Realization Fellowship, Ananda Marga, Osho, Sahaja Yoga, ISKCON
items.note: fold as a modern-export figure-cluster; promote TM / ISKCON / Osho to wave-3 shards if Joe wants

items.name: Chinese (I Ching / Tao)
items.anchor: Shangdi, yin-yang, qian-kun, the Tao
items.note: this shard is the philosophical Tao/I-Ching layer

items.name: Korean (Mu / foundation myth)
items.anchor: Hwanin-Hwanung-Dangun; the mudang shaman; Sansin

items.name: Shinto
items.anchor: Amaterasu, Susanoo, Raijin; the kami

items.name: Ainu (kamuy animism)
items.anchor: Kamuy-huci the hearth-grandmother; Kim-un-kamuy the bear; the iyomante

items.name: Confucianism (Ruism)
items.anchor: Confucius; Tian (Heaven); ren & li; sage & ancestor veneration
items.note: distinct from the Tao shard — the other half of the Chinese cosmos

items.name: Religious Taoism (Daojiao)
items.anchor: Zhang Daoling & the Celestial Masters; the Jade Emperor; talismanic liturgy; neidan alchemy
items.note: institutional Daoism, distinct from the philosophical Tao shard

items.name: Chinese folk religion (Shenism)
items.anchor: the Jade Emperor's bureaucratic pantheon; ancestor worship; temple cults
items.note: the living substrate beneath Tao/Confucian/Buddhist; fold Mazu, Wong Tai Sin, the Bai/Yi/Zhuang local gods as figures

items.name: Yiguandao / Chinese redemptive societies
items.anchor: the Eternal Venerable Mother (Wusheng Laomu); five-teachings syncretism; spirit-writing
items.note: fold Xiantiandao, Dejiao

items.name: Falun Gong (Falun Dafa)
items.anchor: Li Hongzhi; the rotating falun; Zhen-Shan-Ren (truth-compassion-forbearance)

items.name: Tenrikyo + Japanese new religions
items.anchor: Nakayama Miki; Oyagami 'God the Parent'; the Joyous Life
items.note: anchor shard for Japanese shinshūkyō — fold Oomoto, Konkokyo, Seicho-no-Ie, Sukyo Mahikari, PL Kyodan, Reiyukai, Aum/Aleph as figures

items.name: Cheondoism (Donghak) + Korean NRMs
items.anchor: Choe Je-u; 'In-nae-cheon' — humanity IS Heaven
items.note: fold Jeungsanism, Won Buddhism, Daejonggyo as figures

items.name: Caodaism (Cao Đài)
items.anchor: the supreme Cao Đài via séance; the Divine Eye; saints Victor Hugo & Sun Yat-sen
items.note: fold Hòa Hảo & Đạo Mẫu (Vietnamese mother-goddess mediumship) as kin-figures or wave-3 shards

items.name: Polynesian
items.anchor: Ranginui & Papatūānuku, Maui, the Kāne↔Tāne cognate-star
items.note: incl. Māori deepening

items.name: Hawaiian
items.anchor: Kāne, Kū, Lono, Pele

items.name: Ngaju Dayak (Kaharingan)
items.anchor: Ranying Hatalla; the Tiwah secondary-burial rite

items.name: Aboriginal Australian (the Dreaming)
items.anchor: the Dreaming, the Rainbow Serpent, Baiame, the songlines

items.name: Rapa Nui (Easter Island)
items.anchor: Makemake the creator; the Tangata Manu (Birdman) cult at Orongo; the moai
items.note: ★ sui generis even within Polynesia — split out

items.name: Melanesian (Mana / Tabu)
items.anchor: mana — the impersonal sacred power (Codrington's source-concept); ancestral tindalo
items.note: the baseline island-Melanesian religion

items.name: Cargo Cults (Melanesian millenarian)
items.anchor: John Frum; the Prince Philip Movement; Western goods as returning-ancestor cargo
items.note: ★ Joe's mandate explicitly wants cargo cults in

items.name: Papuan (Highland & lowland New Guinea)
items.anchor: ancestral ghosts & the pig-exchange (Te/Moka); the Asmat bisj poles; the Marind Dema
items.note: fold highland (Enga/Melpa) + lowland (Asmat/Marind) as figures

items.name: Micronesian (Pohnpei / Chamorro / Yap)
items.anchor: Nan Madol's priest-kings & Isokelekel; Puntan & Fu'una the Chamorro sibling-creators
items.note: anchors a whole un-covered region; fold Palau/Yap stone-money sacrality

items.name: Fijian (iTaukei)
items.anchor: Degei the great serpent-god; ancestral vū spirits
items.note: the Melanesia-Polynesia bridge; the Tuka movement's homeland

items.name: Burmese Nat worship
items.anchor: the Thirty-Seven Nats (spirits of violent death); Mahagiri; nat-pwe possession
items.note: institutionalized spirit-pantheon alongside Theravada

items.name: Tai-Khmer spirit cults (Phi / Neak Ta)
items.anchor: the phi spirits & the spirit-house; Khmer neak ta territorial guardians; the baci soul-calling
items.note: animist substrate under SE-Asian Buddhism; fold Lao Satsana Phi

items.name: Anitism (Philippine folk religion)
items.anchor: anito & diwata spirits; Bathala; the babaylan shaman-priestess

items.name: Kejawèn & Indonesian indigenous
items.anchor: Javanese inner-essence mysticism (rasa)
items.note: anchor shard — fold Sunda Wiwitan, Parmalim (Batak), Aluk To Dolo (Toraja), Marapu (Sumba), Wetu Telu, Iban as figures

items.name: Hmong shamanism (Ua Dab)
items.anchor: the txiv neeb shaman; soul-calling (hu plig); three-world journeys

items.name: Tengrism (Turkic-Mongolic)
items.anchor: Tengri, Umai, Erlik, Ülgen; the world-tree pillar; the three-world shaman

items.name: Evenki / Tungus
items.anchor: Buga the cosmos-spirit; the three-world taiga — ★ the etymological HOME of the word 'shaman'
items.note: non-Turkic, non-Mongol; reindeer-taiga cosmology

items.name: Yakut / Sakha
items.anchor: Ürüng Aiyy Toyon the white-creator vs the abaasy; the white-vs-black shaman split
items.note: Turkic but a distinct NE-Siberian dual-pantheon

items.name: Buryat
items.anchor: the 99 tengri; Father-Heaven/Mother-Earth; the böö shamans of Olkhon

items.name: Chukchi & Koryak (Paleo-Siberian)
items.anchor: Raven (Kutkh) the trickster-creator; Amanita shamanism
items.note: wholly outside the Altaic/tengrist family; the Raven-creator complex bridges to pacificnw

items.name: Nenets / Samoyedic
items.anchor: Num the sky-god & Nga the death-god; Ya-Nebya 'Mother Earth'; the sacred sledge
items.note: Uralic — kin-family to sami/finnish

items.name: Khanty & Mansi (Ob-Ugric)
items.anchor: Numi-Torum the sky-father; the World-Surveyor-Man; the bear-feast
items.note: linguistic cousins of the Hungarians

items.name: Mongolian folk religion (Böö Mörgöl)
items.anchor: Qormusta Tengri, chief of the 99 tngri; ovoo cairn-offerings
items.note: the Mongol heartland strand of tengri-worship

items.name: Sámi
items.anchor: the noaidi drum; Beaivi the sun; the bear-cult

items.name: Yoruba
items.anchor: Shango, Eshu, Ogun; the orishas

items.name: Akan / Ashanti
items.anchor: Nyame the withdrawn sky-god; Anansi; Asase Yaa

items.name: Dogon
items.anchor: Amma & the world-egg; the Nommo; the Sigui rite

items.name: Igbo
items.anchor: Chukwu, Ala the earth, chi the personal spirit

items.name: Kongo / Bantu
items.anchor: Nzambi a Mpungu; the dikenga cosmogram; Kalunga; the minkisi

items.name: Fon / Dahomey (Vodun)
items.anchor: Mawu-Lisa; Legba; Dan the rainbow-serpent; the Fa oracle

items.name: Zulu / Nguni
items.anchor: Unkulunkulu, uMvelinqangi, Nomkhubulwane

items.name: San / |Xam (Bushman)
items.anchor: ǀKaggen the mantis; the trance-dance; the eland; the moon-hare

items.name: Khoekhoe (Khoikhoi / Nama)
items.anchor: the origin-of-death moon-message; ǀ/Heitsi-Eibib

items.name: Shona
items.anchor: Mwari/Musikavanhu at the Matonjeni oracle-caves; the mhondoro lion-spirits
items.note: fold Venda (Raluvhimba) here

items.name: Maasai
items.anchor: Enkai/Engai, the black-and-red sky-god of Ol Doinyo Lengai; cattle from God

items.name: Kikuyu (Gĩkũyũ)
items.anchor: Ngai/Mwene-Nyaga on Mt Kenya; the Gĩkũyũ & Mũmbi ancestral couple
items.note: fold Akamba (shared Ngai)

items.name: Dinka & Nuer (Nilotic)
items.anchor: Nhialic / Kwoth the sky-creator; the ox-sacrifice & spear-master
items.note: fold Shilluk (Juok / divine-king Reth) & Anuak

items.name: Serer (A ƭat Roog)
items.anchor: Roog Sene the supreme immensity; the pangool ancestral intercessors

items.name: Bamana / Bambara
items.anchor: Maa Ngala the creator; the six initiation societies (Komo, Chiwara…)
items.note: kin to dogon; distinct Komo/Chiwara complex

items.name: Waaqeffanna (Oromo)
items.anchor: Waaqa the sky supreme-being; the Gadaa system; the Irreecha thanksgiving
items.note: Cushitic monotheism

items.name: Baganda (Lubaale)
items.anchor: Katonda the distant creator; the Balubaale pantheon (Mukasa, Kibuka); royal shrines

items.name: Luba & Kuba (Central Bantu)
items.anchor: Shakapanga/Leza; Mbombo/Bumba who vomited the sun & moon into being
items.note: the vomit-creation cosmogony is the anchor

items.name: Chewa (Maravi)
items.anchor: Chiuta the rainbow sky-creator; the Nyau secret society & Gule Wamkulu masked dance

items.name: Tswana-Sotho
items.anchor: Modimo the source-of-all via the badimo ancestors; rain-making
items.note: fold Lozi (Nyambe) — could pair with zulu as Southern Bantu

items.name: Ewe & Ga (Gbe / Kwa coast)
items.anchor: Ewe Mawu-Lisa & Afa divination; Ga Ataa-Naa Nyongmo & the Homowo festival
items.note: sibling to fon; distinct from inland akan

items.name: Santería (Regla de Ocha / Lucumí)
items.anchor: the Orichas (Elegguá, Changó, Yemayá) under the Catholic saints; Ifá divination; the asiento
items.note: ★ Yoruba-derived but creolized — do NOT fold into yoruba

items.name: Haitian Vodou
items.anchor: the Lwa (Legba, Erzulie, Baron Samedi) in Rada & Petwo nanchon; the poto-mitan
items.note: ★ distinct from Fon Vodun root AND from Louisiana Voodoo

items.name: Candomblé
items.anchor: the Orixás in nação houses (Ketu/Jeje/Angola); axé; the terreiro
items.note: fold the nações (Jeje, Angola, Batuque, Tambor de Mina, Xangô do Nordeste) as figures

items.name: Umbanda
items.anchor: Kardecist spiritism + Orixás + the Pretos Velhos, Caboclos & Exu spirit-lines
items.note: 20th-c synthesis distinct from candomble

items.name: Quimbanda
items.anchor: Exu & Pomba Gira worked for direct results; the reinos of Exu
items.note: the 'left-hand' counterpart to umbanda — fits the dark/occult mandate too

items.name: Palo (Reglas de Congo / Palo Monte)
items.anchor: Nzambi + the nganga/prenda cauldron housing an nfumbi spirit; the mpungos
items.note: Bakongo-derived; distinct from kongo root AND santeria

items.name: Abakuá (Ñañiguismo)
items.anchor: all-male Cross-River Ékpè leopard society; the Sikán myth; the Ekue drum; the Íreme masquerade

items.name: Winti
items.anchor: Anana the creator + pantheons of winti spirits (Aisa, Papa Winti, the Kromanti)

items.name: Espiritismo
items.anchor: Kardecan spiritism creolized; the mesa blanca; spirit guides; the 'cruzado' fusion with Santería
items.note: bridges to Spiritualism in the West

items.name: Trinidad Orisha & Spiritual Baptist
items.anchor: the Orishas (Shango central) feasted with saints; the 'mourning' rite, bell & chalk veves

items.name: Jamaican Revival / Kumina / Myal / Obeah
items.anchor: Kongo ancestral possession (Kumina); the obeah-man's spirit-work; Revival Zion bands of angels
items.note: anchor shard for the Jamaican complex — fold Myal, Convince, Maroon Kromanti as figures; Obeah's harm/heal duality

items.name: Hoodoo (Conjure / Rootwork)
items.anchor: mojo bags, goofer dust, crossroads work, High John the Conqueror; psalms as spells
items.note: a folk-magic SYSTEM, not a pantheon; fold Louisiana Voodoo (Marie Laveau, Li Grand Zombi) & Gullah-Geechee ring-shout

items.name: Lakota / Sioux
items.anchor: Wakan Tanka; Iktomi; Ptesan-Win (White Buffalo Woman); the sacred hoop

items.name: Navajo / Diné
items.anchor: Changing Woman; the Hero Twins; Spider Woman; hózhó; the four sacred mountains

items.name: Haudenosaunee / Iroquois
items.anchor: Sky Woman & the Great Turtle; the earth-diver; orenda; the Great Peace

items.name: Inuit / Yupik
items.anchor: Sedna mistress of the sea; Sila; the angakkuq soul-flight

items.name: Pacific NW (Haida / Tlingit)
items.anchor: Raven who steals the light; the Thunderbird; crest-lineage; the property-soul

items.name: Pueblo (Hopi & Zuni)
items.anchor: the kachinas; the emergence from lower worlds; the sipapu

items.name: Cherokee
items.anchor: Unetlanvhi the Great Spirit; the three-world cosmos; the Uktena horned serpent

items.name: Anishinaabe / Ojibwe
items.anchor: Gitche Manitou the Great Mystery; Nanabozho the trickster-transformer; the Midewiwin lodge
items.note: fold Cree (Wīhtikow/Wendigo) & Blackfoot (Napi) — or promote to wave-3 shards

items.name: Muscogee (Creek) & Mississippian
items.anchor: the sacred fire & the Green Corn (Busk) renewal; the Master of Breath; the Cahokia Birdman
items.note: fold the Southeastern Ceremonial Complex / the mound-religion

items.name: California (Chumash & neighbors)
items.anchor: Hutash the Earth-Mother & the Rainbow Bridge; the 'antap astronomer-priesthood; Sky-Coyote
items.note: fold the Chinigchinich religion & Maidu Worldmaker

items.name: Native American Church (Peyotism)
items.anchor: the peyote sacrament ('Mescalito'); the Half-Moon altar; the Peyote Road
items.note: a documented pan-tribal syncretic religion; cross-lists with entheogenic churches

items.name: Ghost Dance & prophetic movements
items.anchor: Wovoka's circle-dance prophecy of the returning dead; the Ghost Shirt
items.note: fold the Longhouse Religion (Handsome Lake, 1799) & the Indian Shaker Church (1882)

items.name: Mesoamerican (composite)
items.anchor: Tlaloc, Tezcatlipoca, Quetzalcoatl, Ometeotl, the ballgame, patolli, the Hero Twins
items.note: ★ collapses Aztec+Maya+more — Joe may split (see aztec, maya)

items.name: Inca / Andean
items.anchor: Viracocha, Inti, Pachamama, Mama Killa, the inkari

items.name: Mapuche
items.anchor: Ngenechen; the machi shaman; the rewe step-tree

items.name: Tupi-Guaraní
items.anchor: Tupã; Yvy marã eʼỹ — the Land-Without-Evil

items.name: Taíno
items.anchor: Yúcahu & Atabey; the zemís; the cohoba rite

items.name: Aztec (Mexica)
items.anchor: Huitzilopochtli demanding blood to forestall the Fifth Sun's collapse
items.note: split from mesoamerican? — flag; distinct Nahua pantheon & the tonalpohualli

items.name: Maya
items.anchor: Itzamna & the Popol Vuh Hero Twins; the Lords of Xibalba; K'inich Ajaw
items.note: split from mesoamerican? — flag; own glyphic corpus & calendar; living in highland practice

items.name: Olmec
items.anchor: the were-jaguar / proto-Feathered-Serpent — the 'mother culture' the later gods descend from

items.name: Zapotec & Mixtec (Oaxacan)
items.anchor: Cocijo the lightning-rain god; Dzahui; the codex lineage-cosmology
items.note: own scripts/calendars; fold Toltec (Quetzalcoatl-priest-king) & Teotihuacan (the Storm-God & Great Goddess) & Purépecha (Curicaueri)

items.name: Muisca (Chibcha)
items.anchor: Bochica the bearded culture-hero; the El Dorado gold-offering at Guatavita

items.name: Selk'nam & Yámana (Fuegian)
items.anchor: Temáukel & the Hain initiation with its masked spirits; Watauinéwa — the southernmost human religion

items.name: Amazonian visionary (Yanomami / Shipibo / Tukano / Gê)
items.anchor: Omama & the xapiri; the ayahuasca icaros & kené patterns; the Sun-Father's Yuruparí order
items.note: anchor shard for forest cosmologies — fold Shipibo, Desana/Tukano, Kayapó/Gê as figures

items.name: Pre-Inca Andean (Chavín / Moche / Tiwanaku)
items.anchor: the Chavín Lanzón Staff-God; the Moche 'Decapitator' Ai-Apaec; the Tiwanaku Gateway-of-the-Sun (Viracocha prototype)
items.note: the root horizons the andean/Inca shard grew from; fold Nazca, Wari

items.name: Hermeticism
items.anchor: Hermes Trismegistus & the Corpus Hermeticum; 'as above, so below'; the nous-ascent
items.note: ★ split OUT of gnostic — its own initiatic philosophy, living via the Renaissance/occult revival

items.name: Alchemy
items.anchor: the Magnum Opus; the Philosopher's Stone; nigredo→albedo→rubedo
items.note: inner-transmutation as a spiritual system; Chinese neidan cross-links to taoism-religious

items.name: Hermetic Qabalah
items.anchor: the Tree of Life & 32 Paths as the occult skeleton of the West
items.note: the Christianized-occult offshoot of Jewish kabbalah

items.name: Rosicrucianism
items.anchor: Christian Rosenkreuz & the Fama Fraternitatis; the invisible college
items.note: fold the modern AMORC

items.name: Esoteric Freemasonry
items.anchor: the Craft degrees; Hiram Abiff; the Royal Art as moral allegory
items.note: fold Martinism

items.name: Hermetic Order of the Golden Dawn
items.anchor: Mathers/Westcott/Woodman; the master-synthesis of Western ceremonial magic
items.note: fold Enochian (Dee), BOTA, the Society of the Inner Light (Dion Fortune)

items.name: Thelema (Crowley / OTO / A∴A∴)
items.anchor: Aleister Crowley & the Book of the Law; 'Do what thou wilt'; True Will; the Aeon of Horus

items.name: Theosophy
items.anchor: H.P. Blavatsky & the Secret Doctrine; the Masters; root-races; akasha — ★ the root of the New Age
items.note: fold Ascended-Master teachings (I AM / CUT) or give them their own NRM shard

items.name: Anthroposophy
items.anchor: Rudolf Steiner; spiritual science; the etheric Christ; Waldorf & biodynamics
items.note: split from theosophy

items.name: Spiritualism
items.anchor: the Fox sisters; mediumship; 'no death, only transition' — the 19th-c root of channeling
items.note: bridges to espiritismo & the New Age channeling stream

items.name: Swedenborgianism (New Church)
items.anchor: Emanuel Swedenborg; the doctrine of correspondences; heaven & hell as inner states

items.name: The Fourth Way (Gurdjieff)
items.anchor: G.I. Gurdjieff; 'man is asleep'; self-remembering; the Enneagram; conscious labor

items.name: Chaos Magic
items.anchor: Carroll & Spare's sigils; 'nothing is true, everything is permitted'; belief as a tool

items.name: Astrology · Tarot · Numerology
items.anchor: the zodiac as fate-map; the 78 Tarot keys; Pythagorean sacred number
items.note: anchor shard for divination-as-worldview ('as above, so below' applied to a life); fold the three as figures or split astrology out (wave-3)

items.name: LaVeyan Satanism (Church of Satan)
items.anchor: Anton LaVey & the Satanic Bible; self-as-one's-own-god; indulgence over abstinence
items.note: the modern-Satanism anchor; atheistic/symbolic

items.name: The Satanic Temple
items.anchor: Baphomet-as-civil-liberties; the Seven Tenets; non-theistic activism

items.name: Theistic / Traditional Satanism
items.anchor: worship of Satan as a real entity (vs LaVey's symbol)
items.note: umbrella for devotional currents; fold demonolatry & Goetic command-magic

items.name: Setianism (Temple of Set)
items.anchor: Michael Aquino; Set as the principle of isolate intelligence (Xeper)

items.name: Luciferianism
items.anchor: Lucifer as light-bringer/liberator (not Satan); gnostic-adjacent self-divinization

items.name: Order of Nine Angles (O9A)
items.anchor: 'Anton Long' (David Myatt); the sinister Seven-Fold Way
items.note: the extremist pole — include & flag honestly (accelerationist ties); do not sanitize, do not valorize

items.name: Goetia & Grimoire Demonology
items.anchor: the 72 demons of the Lesser Key of Solomon; conjure-and-command magic
items.note: the grimoire tradition; bridges to demonolatry & ceremonial magic

items.name: Wicca (Gardnerian / Alexandrian)
items.anchor: Gerald Gardner & the Wiccan Rede; the Goddess & Horned God; the coven; the Wheel of the Year
items.note: ★ distinct from the ancient celtic shard — a modern revival

items.name: Modern Druidry (OBOD / ADF)
items.anchor: Iolo Morganwg's bardic revival; the awen; the bard-ovate-druid path
items.note: revival construct — distinct from ancient celtic

items.name: Heathenry / Ásatrú / Odinism
items.anchor: Sveinbjörn Beinteinsson; the blót; the Nine Noble Virtues; the Æsir reborn
items.note: modern reconstruction — distinct from the ancient norse shard; flag the folkish/universalist split

items.name: Goddess Movement / feminist witchcraft
items.anchor: the Great Goddess reclaimed; thealogy; 'the Goddess is alive'
items.note: fold Dianic (Z Budapest), Reclaiming (Starhawk), Feri (Anderson) as figures

items.name: Stregheria
items.anchor: Leland's Aradia; Diana, Lucifer & Aradia as witch-deities

items.name: Church of All Worlds
items.anchor: Heinlein-derived 'Thou art God/Goddess'; water-sharing; Gaia the living Earth

items.name: New Age movement
items.anchor: the coming Age of Aquarius; channeling, crystals, holism, self-as-divine
items.note: ★ the umbrella Joe explicitly wants — fold Findhorn, the Harmonic Convergence/2012, crystal-energy healing, Human Design as figures

items.name: New Thought (mind-cure)
items.anchor: Quimby; 'thoughts create reality'; divine Mind; the root of the Law of Attraction
items.note: fold Unity, Religious Science (Science of Mind), Christian Science as figures (or split Christian Science to wave 2)

items.name: Ascended Master Teachings (I AM / CUT)
items.anchor: Saint Germain & the Great White Brotherhood; the Violet Flame; decrees
items.note: Theosophy offshoot — fold here or under theosophy

items.name: Channeling current (Seth / Ramtha / ACIM)
items.anchor: Seth (Jane Roberts), Ramtha (JZ Knight), A Course in Miracles (Schucman); 'you create your own reality'
items.note: the trance-conduit family; descends from Spiritualism

items.name: Neoshamanism / Core Shamanism
items.anchor: Michael Harner's 'core' shamanic journey to non-ordinary reality via the drum
items.note: overlaps the existing castaneda forgery-shard — seam it there

items.name: Scientology / Dianetics
items.anchor: L. Ron Hubbard; the thetan; the reactive mind; auditing toward 'Clear'

items.name: Eckankar
items.anchor: Paul Twitchell; Soul Travel via the Light & Sound of God (ECK); the living Mahanta
items.note: Western reframe of surat-shabd yoga; fold Radhasoami/Sant Mat as the root-figure

items.name: Subud
items.anchor: Muhammad Subuh (Bapak); the latihan kejiwaan — spontaneous surrender to the divine force

items.name: Transcendental Meditation (TM)
items.anchor: Maharishi Mahesh Yogi; the mantra technique; the Maharishi Effect
items.note: cross-lists with modern Hindu NRMs

items.name: UFO religions (Raëlism / Heaven's Gate / Aetherius)
items.anchor: the Elohim cloned us (Raël); shed the vehicle to board the craft (Heaven's Gate); the Cosmic Masters (Aetherius); Ashtar Command
items.note: ★ resonant with Joe's disclosure/trillion-eyed work — anchor shard; fold Unarius, Unizverse People, the 1950s Contactees

items.name: Invented & parody religions
items.anchor: Eris/Discordianism, the Flying Spaghetti Monster, Jediism, the Church of the SubGenius's 'Slack', Kopimism, Dudeism
items.note: anchor shard for fiction-based & satirical religions — each a figure; note the serious-vs-satire spectrum

items.name: Transhumanist & techno-religions
items.anchor: Fyodorov's Cosmist 'Common Task' (resurrect all the dead); Terasem (mindfiles); the Turing Church; Way of the Future (AI godhead)
items.note: ★ thematically adjacent to Joe's substrate/consciousness work

items.name: Entheogenic churches (Santo Daime / UDV / Bwiti)
items.anchor: the ayahuasca sacrament 'Daime' & the hymns; the UDV's hoasca; Gabonese iboga & the initiatory death-rebirth
items.note: the sacrament-as-doorway family; cross-lists with the Native American Church (peyote)

items.name: Urantia / channeled-scripture religions
items.anchor: the celestial-authored Urantia Book cosmology; the Thought Adjuster; an expanded Jesus (Michael)
items.note: fold Oahspe (1882) the proto-UFO channeled 'new bible'

items.name: Esoteric Black-American Islam
items.anchor: Moorish Science (Noble Drew Ali); the Five-Percent Nation's Supreme Mathematics
items.note: kin-figures to the nation-of-islam shard

items.name: Unitarian Universalism
items.anchor: a creedless covenantal faith drawing from all traditions; the inherent worth of every person
items.note: fold historical Unitarianism (Dávid/Socinus) & Universalism

items.name: Deism
items.anchor: a Creator known by reason who does not intervene; the clockmaker God
items.note: diffuse — a stance, no institution

items.name: Pantheism / Spinozism / Gaianism
items.anchor: God and Nature are identical (Deus sive Natura); the living Earth revered (Gaia)
items.note: fold Spinozism, Pandeism, Panentheism, Deep Ecology, Gaianism as figures

items.name: Secular Humanism / organized Atheism
items.anchor: human reason, ethics & dignity without the supernatural; Ethical Culture's 'deed before creed'
items.note: the boundary case — a non-theistic life-stance; include per 'no exceptions' but mark it the edge of the set

items.name: Castaneda (forged Toltec)
items.anchor: Don Juan Matus; the tonal/nagual — de Mille's 'Piltdown of anthropology'
items.note: kept deliberately as the forgery/fool's-gold tier; seam points home to Horden's grounded Tarahumara line
